text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a while after the tryouts, Daiwa Scarlet was constantly
approached by trainers attempting to scout her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But now...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Hm? What, is nobody going to talk to Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I've set my sights on Vodka. No matter how much potential Scarlet
has, her personality is going to make things difficult...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Well, you have a point there. Guess I'll try speaking to Vodka too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, now that's more like it! The annoying crowd's gone, so I can
finally focus on my training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
At least, that's what I'd like to say. Hey! What are you still doing
here?!
choice_data_list: I want to talk with you.
I want to talk with you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, could it be that you still think I'm a perfect honor student
who'll listen to whatever you say?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Since you're still here, I'll let you in on a secret. It was all an act.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is the real me! And like those guys from earlier said—I'm
stubborn, selfish, and short-tempered.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well? Your dreams crushed yet? Good, then scurry along, shoo.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...What? Were you even listening to me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying I'm not the good girl you think I am! Get it into that thick
head of yours already!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy's packed with fast runners! And me, I'm the one who
decided to put on airs, get cocky, and then lose pathetically!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What do you know?! I don't need your pity!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Because... I get it. All I do is mouth off about being the "number one
this", the "number one that"—but it's all talk—it's not real!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I lost to Vodka once, and here I am wallowing in self-pity and going
on reckless training runs... Even I know that I'm being unreasonable!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But... what else can I do?! If I'm not number one, then how can I even
face myself?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I have to be number one in speed, in strength! Number one in
popularity, in fans—and I won't settle for anything else!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I won't be satisfied unless I'm all of those things. That's the kind of
person I am, take it or leave it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: To stay true to myself—I have to keep on being number one!
choice_data_list: That's why I'm here—to support you.
That's why I'm here—to support you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold up. You're saying that after listening to my rant... Are you really that clueless?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Take a hint, pal! I told you, I'm a stubborn girl who's obsessed with
being number one!
choice_data_list: Then let's become number one together.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tch, what's your problem! Why're you still trying to scout me?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll say this now, but I'm not going to just nod my head and listen to
everything you say, you know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And if I don't like your training menu, I won't stop bugging you about
it! Are you willing to deal with all of that?!
choice_data_list: We can discuss all that until we agree!
We can discuss all that until we agree!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Wh-what the heck is with you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Saying you want to support me... that we'll do this together... Hey,
were you serious about all that?
choice_data_list: I'll be your number one trainer.
I'll be your number one trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Could you not steal my catchphrase like that?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Geez... Looks like I've been scouted... by a real weirdo. Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet bursts into tears, as if she's been freed from the heavy
burdens weighing her down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I wonder how long it's been since I cried in front of someone else.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Not really in the mood to run anymore. I guess I should head back.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I've been feeling sluggish recently. So I think... I'll tuck in
early for once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Daiwa Scarlet walks away, I notice that she's lost the spirit she
once had. Looks like the second place finish at the tryouts really did
a number on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still brainstorming ways to get her confidence back, I decide to pay
the cafeteria a visit.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yoohoo, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's just Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaddaya mean, JUST?! ...You okay Vodka? You've got this bored look on your face lately.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not really... You're just imaginin' things.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's just... Recently, she's always walkin' around with that dumb look
on her face...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: She? Oh, you mean Scarlet? She's your roommate and rival, after all. 'Course you'd worry!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not—We're not like that...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But you're right, she's been pretty down in the dumps. I wonder if
losing to you at the tryouts was a big shock for her?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Y'know, I just didn't think she was the type to give up this easily.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Forget it. Whatever, one less rival for me to worry about. Catch
ya later.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey Vodka, wait up! I said waaait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think I might have the perfect solution to all this.
